
# foreman_config_group


Foreman representation of a config group (group of Puppet classes).


## Example Usage

```
# Autogenerated example with required keys
resource "foreman_config_group" "example" {
  name = "base"
}
```


## Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

- `name` - (Required) The name of the config group.
- `puppetclass_ids` - (Optional) Set of Puppet class IDs associated with this config group.


## Attributes Reference

The following attributes are exported:

- `name` - The name of the config group.
- `puppetclass_ids` - Set of Puppet class IDs associated with this config group.
